---
title: "european_quality_of_life_5_dimensions_eq5d5l"
subtitle: "`european_quality_of_life_5_dimensions_eq5d5l`"
description: "european_quality_of_life_5_dimensions_eq5d5l"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/european_quality_of_life_5_dimensions_eq5d5l/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                      | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|---------------------------|------------------------------|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                   | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                        |
| `center`                  | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                     |
| `eq5d_mobility`           | eq5d_mobility                | string | Participant's mobility. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                          |
| `eq5d_self_care`          | eq5d_self_care               | string | Participant's ability to perform self-care. Self-reported by participant.Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                       |
| `eq5d_usual_activities`   | eq5d_usual_activities        | string | Participant's ability to perform usual activities (e.g., work, study, housework, family, or leisure activities). Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10). |
| `eq5d_pain_discomfort`    | eq5d_pain_discomfort         | string | Participant's level of pain or discomfort. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                       |
| `eq5d_anxiety_depression` | eq5d_anxiety_depression      | string | Participant's level of anxiety or depression. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                    |

: Fields in the `european_quality_of_life_5_dimensions_eq5d5l` resource.
